title: Add $writememb support
body:
Resolves #2329 

The implementation is quite straightfowrad. Unlike hex number, binary number cannot be formatted by printf directly, so I write a helper function `formatBinary` to do this.

For tests, it seems $writememh is tested in `t_sys_writemem`. I duplicate it to `t_sys_writemem_b` and add an option `WRITEMEM_BIN` to control whether $writememh or $writememb is used. Test `t_sys_readmem` is also modified to support the new added option. The corresponding golden output for binary case is also added.

I have tested `t_sys_writemem` and `t_sys_writemem_b` locally. It should work.
